properties.name: mode
properties.description: DC for fixed rails, AC for sine waveform output

properties.name: voltage
properties.description: Output voltage in V (DC mode) or peak amplitude (AC mode)

properties.name: currentLimit
properties.description: Maximum sourced current in A. The verifier warns when exceeded.

components.name: Regulated Power Supply
components.description: Bench DC/AC power supply with optional current limit. DC mode for fixed rails (5V, 12V, etc.); AC mode for sine sources. Visually shares the signal-generator chassis so no new Web Component is needed. The current limit is enforced by the circuit verifier — if any load pulls more than the configured amperage, Run is blocked with a 'source-overload' warning, mimicking a real bench supply's foldback behavior.
